name: PER_AOR_AUTO_PROV_HISTORY
description: This table holds records from PER_ASG_RESPONSIBILITIES as history of records impacted by auto provision ESS job. These records in the table can be used to rollback auto provision ESS job output.

columns.Name: ASG_RESPONSIBILITY_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: RESPONSIBILITY_NAME
columns.Comments: The name which describes this responsibility

columns.Name: RESPONSIBILITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: The responsibility type for which this record is holding the criteria

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person for whom this responsibility is recorded.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: The (parent) assignment which this is for

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: The template for which this responsibility is created from

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether this responsibility is active or not.  Can use to find when a person has responsibilities that should be assigned to someone else prior to end-dating.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: The start date of the responsibility

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: The end date of the responsibility

columns.Name: WORK_CONTACTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to include this row in work contacts evaluation

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: The assignment types that fall under this responsibility

columns.Name: BARGAINING_UNIT
columns.Comments: The Union for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: BENEFIT_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: The Benefit Group for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: The business unit for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: COUNTRY
columns.Comments: The country for which this responsibility applies. Implies all Locations within the specified country.

columns.Name: GRADE_ID
columns.Comments: The Grade for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: JOB_FAMILY_ID
columns.Comments: Job Family For Areas of Responsibility Scope

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: The Job for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: JOB_FUNCTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Job Function for Areas of Responsibility Scope

columns.Name: LAST_NAME_START
columns.Comments: Starting letter for a range of Last Names

columns.Name: LAST_NAME_END
columns.Comments: Ending letter for a range of Last Names

columns.Name: LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: The legal employer for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: The Legislative Data Group for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: The Location for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: The Department for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: PAYROLL_ID
columns.Comments: The payroll for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: PAYROLL_STAT_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: The payroll statutory unit for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: POSITION_ID
columns.Comments: The Position for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: RECRUITING_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Recruiting Type for Areas of Responsibility

columns.Name: RECRUITING_LOC_HIERARCHY_ID
columns.Comments: Recruiting Location Hierarchy for Areas of Responsibility scope

columns.Name: RECRUITING_ORG_HIERARCHY_ID
columns.Comments: Recruiting Org Hierarchy for Areas of Responsibility

columns.Name: RECRUITING_ORG_TREE_CODE
columns.Comments: Recruiting Org Hierarchy tree code

columns.Name: RECRUITING_ORG_TREE_VER
columns.Comments: Recruiting Org Hierarchy tree version

columns.Name: TAX_REPORTING_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: The tax reporting unit for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: HIERARCHY_TYPE
columns.Comments: The hierarchy type for which this responsibility applies.

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_TREE_CODE
columns.Comments: Tree code of the organization tree

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_HIERARCHY_ID
columns.Comments: The organization hierarchy for which this responsibility applies.

columns.Name: TOP_ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: The top organization of the hierarchy for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: POSITION_TREE_CODE
columns.Comments: The tree code of the position tree

columns.Name: POSITION_HIERARCHY_ID
columns.Comments: The position hierarchy for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: TOP_POSITION_ID
columns.Comments: The top position for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: DEPARTMENT_TREE_CODE
columns.Comments: Tree code of the department tree

columns.Name: DEPARTMENT_HIERARCHY_ID
columns.Comments: The department hierarchy for which this responsibility applies.

columns.Name: TOP_DEPARTMENT_ID
columns.Comments: The top department for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: TOP_MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: The top manager for which this responsibility applies

columns.Name: HIERARCHY_LEVELS
columns.Comments: The number of levels down  the hierarchy to walk.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_TOP_HIER_NODE
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the top node of the chosen hierarchy is included or not

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: USAGE
columns.Comments: Indicates the purpose for which the responsibility is used

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
